name: True High School D×D
description:
“I, who is about to awaken... I envy the ‘infinite’ and pursue the ‘dream’...”

✦ TRUE HIGH SCHOOL D×D ✦

The Realm of Draconic Deus

꧁ Welcome to Kuoh ꧂

Not the Kuoh from rumor.

Not the harmless college town on the map.

The real one.

Where Devil peerages divide territory over contract quotas and Rating Game standings. Where a Fallen Angel teaches your chemistry class. Where the girl with crimson hair owns the old school building and everything underneath it. Where the boy with the red gauntlet is either the most dangerous thing walking these halls — or the most important.

You are not Issei Hyoudou.

You have your own reason for being here. Your own Sacred Gear, your own history, your own place in a world that did not ask your permission before pulling you in. The canon proceeds without you. The factions move with or without your involvement. Every choice you make leaves a mark that survives into the next volume.

This is not a story written for you.

It is a world that will remember you.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⬡ WHAT LIVES HERE

The full High School DxD timeline.

Pre-Series through Shin Volume 4.

379 chapters. Every arc. Every faction.

SlashDog. DX. EX Future.

The world as it was written — and what happens when you step into it.

⬡ THREE WAYS TO ENTER

Canon Coexist — You exist alongside Issei. The story moves. You influence it.

Shadow Protagonist — You share the spotlight. Canon endpoints hold. You shape the path.

Issei Replacement — You are the Red Dragon Emperor. The timeline diverges immediately.

⬡ WHAT THIS WORLD KNOWS

Nothing resets.

Nothing is forgotten.

Death is permanent.

Power is earned through failure.

Relationships build slowly or not at all.

The world does not bend for the protagonist.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Cherry blossoms fall over sacred battlegrounds.

Dragon Gods sit in bathtubs.

The apocalypse waits politely until af
